info.name: reservation-management-platform
info.description: Variables se llenan automatico. Orden: 01-Dev Setup → 02-Auth → 03-Tenants → 04-Resources → 05-Reservations → 06-Reports

item.name: Refresh access token using refresh token
Authenticate and obtain JWT tokens (Tenant Admin)

exec: var r=pm.response.json(); if(r.access_token){ pm.collectionVariables.set('access_token', r.access_token); pm.collectionVariables.set('refresh_token', r.refresh_token); console.log('Tenant admin tokens OK'); }

item.name: Create a new tenant (super admin only)

exec: var r=pm.response.json(); if(r.id){ pm.collectionVariables.set('resource_id', r.id); console.log('resource_id:', r.id); }

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Conference Room A",
  "resource_type": "room",
  "description": "Large conference room with projector",
  "capacity": 20,
  "slot_duration_minutes": 60,
  "buffer_minutes": 15,
  "amenities": ["projector", "whiteboard", "video_conferencing"],
  "working_hours": {
    "monday": [{"start": "09:00", "end": "18:00"}],
    "tuesday": [{"start": "09:00", "end": "18:00"}],
    "wednesday": [{"start": "09:00", "end": "18:00"}],
    "thursday": [{"start": "09:00", "end": "18:00"}],
    "friday": [{"start": "09:00", "end": "17:00"}],
    "saturday": [],
    "sunday": []
  }
}

exec: var r=pm.response.json(); if(r.id){ pm.collectionVariables.set('resource_id', r.id); console.log('resource_id:', r.id); }
